nasb.text: So, now issue a decree to make these men stop work, that this city may not be rebuilt until a decree is issued by me.

esv.text: Therefore make a decree that these men be made to cease, and that this city be not rebuilt, until a decree is made by me.

cnv.text: 現在你們要下令叫這些人停工，不得重建這城，等候我的諭令。

ccb.text: 现在你们要下令让这些人停止建造这城，等候我的谕旨。
